refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under defined network conditions and verify it remains within the customer-defined limit.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.
DP2: Use dedicated network link with QoS prioritization for teleoperation data.
DP3: Real-time packet loss monitoring and dynamic adjustment of transmission parameters.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive communication protocol with error correction and retransmission.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication protocol and network link quality.
Dependency on real-time monitoring data for adaptation.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically encapsulates the solution to maintain packet loss within limits with manageable coupling to network conditions and monitoring.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk that adaptive protocol may introduce latency affecting teleoperation responsiveness.
Risk of incomplete error correction coverage under extreme network degradation.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integrating real-time monitoring (DP3) tightly with adaptive protocol to mitigate risks.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and communication stack responsible for teleoperation control and data exchange.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Physical and logical network connection carrying teleoperation data packets.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send status and packet loss metrics to NGHE Solution and Vehicle modules.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands from NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High-level coordination but not focused on communication protocol implementation.
Receives telemetry but does not implement teleoperation communication logic.
Primary module responsible for teleoperation communication protocol and packet loss management.
Minimal involvement in teleoperation communication quality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing the adaptive communication protocol and packet loss management within the Teleoperation module minimizes diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential coupling with network link hardware and NGHE Solution coordination may require well-defined interfaces.
Risk of module overload if Teleoperation also handles unrelated functionalities.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure clear interface definitions with NGHE Solution and Network Link; consider modularizing Teleoperation if scope grows.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive communication protocol) directly addresses the refined FR with clear performance targets and measurable outcomes.

diffusion_risks: Some dependency on network link quality and NGHE Solution coordination may cause interface complexity.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows strong containment score and low diffusion, indicating good architectural packaging.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and network monitoring is feasible within the Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of responsibility for packet loss management to Teleoperation module.

recommended_revisions: Define explicit interface contracts between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry.
Monitor potential scope creep in Teleoperation module to avoid diffusion.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment meeting containment and coupling criteria. Verification and architectural packaging are feasible and aligned with stakeholder needs.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system modules.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; next step is to decompose sub-FRs further.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Customer-defined packet loss limits are stable and measurable.
open_risks: Latency introduced by adaptive protocol may affect teleoperation responsiveness.
Interface complexity between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
evidence_needed: Performance data from adaptive communication protocol under various network conditions.
Interface specification documents between Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.
